description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a front driveway with two parked cars. The house has a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout, with large windows and sliding doors providing access to the backyard. The backyard includes a grassy area, a tree with pink blossoms, and a small patio or play area. The front yard is landscaped with grass and a paved driveway leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials, likely stucco or painted concrete, with dark window frames and doors. The overall design is contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two parked cars, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the wooden fence, and the backyard with a tree and play area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, and large windows or sliding doors opening to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, cars, and the side of the house with additional yard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large rear and side windows
